Cut the ham into pieces directly over the bowl.
Crumble the feta into the bowl by hand.
Beat the eggs in a separate bowl, removing any shell.
Stir the eggs into the vegetable mixture. Oil a small ovenproof dish, pour in the mixture, and bake 30 minutes until set. Serve with salad and crusty bread.

name: Real tomato soup
steps: Heat the oil and cook the onion and garlic about 5 minutes until softened. Stir in the tomato puree, then add the chopped tomatoes and basil; bring to a boil. Simmer 15 minutes until thick and flavorful. Blend if you want it smooth (can be cooled and frozen up to a month at this point).

To finish, return the mixture to a pan. Mix the baking soda with a little milk until smooth, stir into the tomato mixture, then add the remaining milk. Bring to a boil (it will froth briefly), then simmer gently 5 minutes before serving.

name: Tuna melt pizza baguettes

ingredients.food_name: Chester (Cheddar) cheese min. 50 % fat in dry matter

steps: Set the oven to 190C (170C fan/gas 5). Halve the baguettes lengthways and bake directly on the oven shelf 8 minutes. Meanwhile, combine the diced peppers, sweetcorn, tuna, and most of the cheddar.
Transfer the baguettes to a tray, spread each with tomato puree, top with the tuna mixture, and sprinkle with the remaining cheddar. Bake 12 minutes until melted and golden.

name: Chicken with Spanish-style butter beans

ingredients.raw_text: 400g can of butter beans, drained and rinsed

ingredients.food_name: Feta min. 45 % fat in dry matter

steps: Whisk the roasted garlic, oil, lemon zest and juice, smoked paprika, and seasoning together. Toss with the butter beans, peppers, tomatoes, and rocket. Divide into containers, top with the chicken, and crumble over the feta.

name: Giant couscous salad with charred veg & tangy pesto

ingredients.raw_text: 2 green or orange peppers, deseeded and cubed

steps: Set the oven to 200C (180C fan/gas 6). Toss the beetroot, onions, and peppers with oil, spread on a lined tray, and roast 35 minutes. Add the cherry tomatoes and roast 10 minutes more until softened and tender.

Meanwhile, cook the couscous per pack instructions, rinse, and drain. For the pesto, blend the coriander, half the parsley, garlic, chilli, cumin, vinegar, oil, most of the pine nuts, and water until smooth.
Toss the roasted vegetables and remaining parsley through the couscous, top with the pesto, and scatter with the reserved pine nuts. For two servings, eat half now and chill the rest for another day.

name: Vegan kale pesto pasta
steps: Blanch the kale 30 seconds, then plunge into ice water 5 minutes. Drain and pat dry.
Blend the basil, garlic, seeds, oil, nutritional yeast, lemon juice and zest, and kale until smooth; season, thinning with water if too thick.
Cook the pasta per pack instructions and toss with the pesto to serve.

name: Lentil salad with tahini dressing

ingredients.raw_text: 2 large carrots, cut into thin sticks (320g)
2 medium red onions, halved and sliced
good handful of mint, roughly chopped
a little smoked paprika, to serve

steps: Heat the oil in a wok and fry the sweet potato 5 minutes, stirring, until softening (cover if browning too fast). Add the carrot, courgette, onion, cumin, and ginger; cook over high heat, stirring, until tender and lightly charred. Stir in the seeds for the last couple of minutes. Off the heat, add the lentils, bouillon powder, lemon zest, mint, and parsley.
Meanwhile, combine the tahini, garlic, yogurt, and water into a dressing. Spoon the salad into bowls, top with the dressing and paprika if using. For meal prep, portion into containers and chill.

name: Herby quinoa, feta & pomegranate salad

ingredients.food_name: Feta min. 45 % fat in dry matter

ingredients.raw_text: 200g pomegranate seeds from tub or fruit
85g toasted pine nuts or toasted flaked almonds
small pack each coriander, flat leaf parsley and mint, roughly chopped

steps: Cook the quinoa per pack instructions until tender with a little bite. Drain and spread on a platter to cool and steam-dry quickly.
Once just cool, stir through the remaining ingredients with plenty of seasoning.

name: Quick chicken hummus bowl

ingredients.raw_text: 1cooked chicken breast, sliced at an angle

steps: Combine 2 tbsp hummus with half the lemon juice, the zest, and enough water for a drizzly dressing. Separate the grain pouch, divide between bowls, and toss with the dressing. Top each with a handful of spinach.

Squeeze the remaining lemon juice over the avocado halves and add one to each bowl. Divide the chicken, pomegranate, onion, almonds, and remaining hummus between the bowls, mixing gently just before eating.

name: Bombay potato frittata

ingredients.raw_text: ½ green chilli, deseeded and finely chopped
1 small bunch of coriander, finely chopped

steps: Boil the potatoes 6 minutes until tender, drain, and steam-dry. Meanwhile, microwave the spinach with a little water, covered, 3 minutes until wilted.

Heat the oil and cook the onion over medium heat 10 minutes until golden and sticky. Add the garlic, coriander, cumin, mustard seeds, and turmeric; cook 1 minute more. Add the tomatoes and wilted spinach, cook 3 minutes, then add the potatoes.
Heat the grill to medium. Beat the eggs with the chilli and most of the coriander and pour over the potato mixture. Grill 4-5 minutes until golden and just set with a slight wobble.
Cool slightly and slice into wedges. Mix the mango chutney, yogurt, and remaining coriander, and serve alongside.

name: Veggie olive wraps with mustard vinaigrette
steps: Combine all the filling ingredients and toss well.

Lay the tortilla on foil and pile the filling along one side - it will look like a lot but compacts as you roll. Roll tightly from the filling side, tucking in the ends, then wrap the foil around it. Slice in half to eat right away, or leave whole and wrap in parchment to take with you.

name: Sesame chicken noodles

ingredients.raw_text: ½ tsp chilli flakes, plus extra to serve
½ cucumber, seeds removed and cut into half moons
½ small pack mint, roughly chopped

steps: Whisk the tahini, lime juice, soy sauce, roasted garlic flesh, sesame oil, and chilli flakes, adding water for a creamy dressing.
Toss the noodles, leftover chicken, aubergine, and carrot with the dressing. Gently fold in the cucumber and mint. Divide into containers and top with extra chilli flakes.

name: Whole roast chicken with braised roots & peas

ingredients.raw_text: 1 tbsp thyme leaves,  plus the stalks
450ml vegetable stock, made with 2 tsp bouillon powder

steps: Set the oven to 200C (180C fan/gas 6). Combine the potatoes, leeks, thyme, garlic, and swede in a roasting tin. Pour in the stock and brush the vegetables with oil. Roast 20 minutes.

Place the thyme stalks inside the chicken cavity, then set the chicken on the vegetables and roast 1 hour until cooked through, adding water partway if the potatoes start to catch. Rest the chicken 10 minutes. Meanwhile, cook half the peas per pack instructions.

Carve off the legs, remove the skin, and serve with half the vegetables and peas. Cool the remainder and refrigerate up to three days; reheat with the vegetables (skin removed) and serve with freshly cooked peas.

name: Pomegranate chicken with almond couscous

ingredients.raw_text: 1 large red onion, halved and thinly sliced
4 tbsp tagine spice paste or 2 tbsp harissa
190ml bottle pomegranate juice (not sweetened; we used Pom Wonderful)

steps: Boil the kettle and heat the oil. Combine the couscous with seasoning and half a crumbled stock cube in a bowl. Soften the onion in the pan a few minutes. Cover the couscous with boiling water, cover with a towel, and set aside.

Push the onion aside, brown the chicken on all sides, then stir in the tagine paste or harissa and pomegranate juice. Crumble in the remaining stock cube, season, and simmer uncovered 10 minutes until thickened and the chicken is cooked. Stir through most of the pomegranate seeds, saving some for garnish.
Fluff the couscous and stir through the almonds and mint. Serve the chicken over the couscous with the sauce spooned over and the reserved pomegranate seeds.

name: Ricotta, tomato & spinach frittata

ingredients.food_name: Ricotta min. 45 % fat in dry matter

steps: Set the oven to 200C (180C fan/gas 6). Heat the oil and cook the onion 5-6 minutes until softened and lightly golden. Add the tomatoes and toss 1 minute to soften.
Off the heat, add the spinach and basil and toss to wilt slightly. Transfer to a greased baking tin and dot with spoonfuls of ricotta.
Beat the seasoned eggs and pour over. Bake 20-25 minutes until pale golden and set. Serve with salad.

name: Curried cod

ingredients.raw_text: thumb-sized piece ginger, peeled and finely grated
zest 1 lemon, then cut into wedges

steps: Heat the oil in a lidded pan and cook the onion over high heat a few minutes. Stir in the curry powder, ginger, and garlic; cook 1-2 minutes until fragrant. Add the tomatoes, chickpeas, and seasoning.
Cook 8-10 minutes until slightly thickened, then top with the cod. Cover and cook 5-10 minutes more until cooked through. Finish with lemon zest and coriander, and serve with lemon wedges.

name: Healthy chilli con carne

ingredients.raw_text: 1-2 tbsp olive oil, plus extra if needed
1-2 tbsp chipotle paste (or gluten-free alternative), depending on how spicy you like it
400g can kidney bean in chilli sauce
1 lime, zested and cut into wedges
¼ small pack coriander, leaves only

steps: Heat the oil and brown the beef in batches; set aside.

Cook the onion in the same pan until softened, adding more oil if needed. Add the garlic, cumin, and chipotle paste; cook 1 minute. Drain the kidney beans, reserving the liquid. Add the reserved liquid, chopped tomatoes, and a can of water to the pan, then return the meat. Simmer, covered, 2 hours until tender (or bake at 160C/140C fan/gas 3 for 3 hours).
Stir in the reserved kidney beans and lime zest; season and warm through. Serve with coriander, lime wedges, and rice.

name: Lentil salad with tahini dressing

ingredients.raw_text: 2 large carrots, cut into thin sticks (320g)
2 medium red onions, halved and sliced
good handful of mint, roughly chopped
a little smoked paprika, to serve

steps: Heat the oil in a wok and fry the sweet potato 5 minutes, stirring, until softening (cover if browning too fast). Add the carrot, courgette, onion, cumin, and ginger; cook over high heat, stirring, until tender and lightly charred. Stir in the seeds for the last couple of minutes. Off the heat, add the lentils, bouillon powder, lemon zest, mint, and parsley.
Meanwhile, combine the tahini, garlic, yogurt, and water into a dressing. Spoon the salad into bowls, top with the dressing and paprika if using. For meal prep, portion into containers and chill.

name: Smashed chicken with corn slaw

ingredients.raw_text: 1 red onion, halved and finely sliced

steps: Halve the chicken breasts and flatten between parchment with a rolling pin. Combine the lime zest and juice with the yogurt, thyme, turmeric, coriander, and garlic; coat the chicken and marinate while making the slaw.
Mash the avocado with the lime juice and zest, 2 tbsp yogurt, and coriander. Stir in the corn, red pepper, onion, and cabbage.

Cook the chicken in batches in a hot pan or griddle a few minutes per side (it's thin, so it cooks fast). Serve with the slaw and new potatoes. For two servings, chill half the chicken and slaw for another day (within two days).

name: Cumin-spiced halloumi with corn & tomato slaw

ingredients.raw_text: 100g fine green beans, blanched, trimmed and halved
1 red onion, halved and finely sliced

steps: Combine the lime zest and juice with the oil, thyme, turmeric, cumin, coriander, and garlic. Add the halloumi and turn gently to coat (it breaks easily).
For the slaw, mix the lime juice and zest, yogurt, coriander, and chilli, then stir in the corn, red pepper, beans, tomatoes, onion, and cabbage.
Fry the halloumi in batches in a hot non-stick or griddle pan 1 minute per side. Serve over the slaw. For two servings, halve the portions and chill the rest for another day.

name: Lemony chicken stew with giant couscous

ingredients.raw_text: 500g skinless boneless chicken thighs, each cut into 2-3 chunks
3 tbsp tagine paste or 2 tbsp ras el hanout
2 x 400g cans tomato with chopped mixed olives
small handful fresh oregano, leaves picked and chopped
2 preserved lemons, flesh removed, skin rinsed and finely chopped

steps: Heat the oil in a lidded casserole. Cook the onions 10 minutes until starting to caramelize. Push aside and brown the chicken over high heat 5 minutes.

Add the tagine paste, tomatoes, oregano, preserved lemons, honey, and crumbled stock cube, plus a half-can of water. Season, stir, cover, and simmer gently 40 minutes (or up to 4 hours on very low heat if serving staggered).
Stir in the couscous 10 minutes before serving, cover, and simmer 10 minutes until cooked (for staggered servings, cook 50g couscous per portion separately). Finish with parsley.

name: Sesame & ginger sushi bowls

ingredients.raw_text: 25g ginger (choose a straight piece that is quite slim), peeled
4 tbsp raw apple cider vinegar, plus 1 tbsp
1 large carrot, shredded into long matchsticks or coarsely grated

steps: Slice the ginger thinly and massage with most of the vinegar and a splash of water to soften; set aside.

Combine the rice with water in a pan, bring to a boil, cover, and simmer 15 minutes. Add the edamame on top without stirring, cover, and cook 7 minutes more until the rice is tender and the water absorbed.

Lift off the edamame and set aside. Stir the remaining vinegar and half the tamari into the rice, then spread out to cool quickly. Once cool, divide into bowls and top with avocado, carrot, beans, tomatoes, and cucumber.
Scatter the softened ginger on top. Mix the remaining tamari and sesame oil into the reserved vinegar and drizzle over. Finish with seeds; keeps refrigerated two days.

name: Easy chilli con carne

ingredients.raw_text: 2 beef stock cubes (we like Just Bouillon)
2 large red peppers, deseeded and cut into chunks
3 x 400g cans red kidney beans, drained

steps: Set the oven to 150C (130C fan/gas 3). Heat the oil and fry the onions 8 minutes. Add the garlic, spices, and oregano; cook 1 minute. Add the mince gradually, browning it, then stir in the tomatoes, half a can of water, and crumbled stock cube; season.
Cover and bake 30 minutes. Stir in the peppers and sundried tomatoes, then bake 30 minutes more until the peppers are tender. Stir in the beans.
Reheat on the hob until bubbling before serving with avocado or salad, rice or tortilla chips, and soured cream.

For a slow cooker: fry the onions 8 minutes, add the garlic, spices, and oregano for 1 minute, then brown the mince. Transfer everything to the slow cooker with the tomatoes, peppers, sundried tomatoes, beans, and crumbled stock cubes; season. Cook on low 8-10 hours, then serve as above.

name: Burnt aubergine veggie chilli

ingredients.raw_text: 1 tbsp olive oil or rapeseed oil
70g puy lentils or green lentils, rinsed
tortilla chips, mashed avocado, yogurt or soured cream, grated cheddar, roughly chopped coriander (optional)

steps: Char the aubergine directly over a gas flame (or under a very hot grill), turning until blackened all over. Cool, peel off the skin, discard the stem, and roughly chop the flesh.
Heat the oil and cook the onion and carrots with salt over low-medium heat 15-20 minutes until the carrots soften.

Add the aubergine, both lentils, kidney beans with their liquid, soy sauce, tomatoes, chocolate, chilli powder, oregano, and spices. Add the stock, bring to a boil, then reduce to very low heat. Cover and cook 1.5 hours, stirring every 15-20 minutes.
Uncover and simmer over low-medium heat, stirring occasionally, about 15 minutes until thickened. Stir in the lime juice and adjust seasoning. Serve hot over rice.

name: Healthy chilli con carne

ingredients.raw_text: 1-2 tbsp olive oil, plus extra if needed
1-2 tbsp chipotle paste (or gluten-free alternative), depending on how spicy you like it
400g can kidney bean in chilli sauce
1 lime, zested and cut into wedges
¼ small pack coriander, leaves only

steps: Heat the oil and brown the beef in batches; set aside.

Cook the onion in the same pan until softened, adding more oil if needed. Add the garlic, cumin, and chipotle paste; cook 1 minute. Drain the kidney beans, reserving the liquid. Add the reserved liquid, chopped tomatoes, and a can of water to the pan, then return the meat. Simmer, covered, 2 hours until tender (or bake at 160C/140C fan/gas 3 for 3 hours).
Stir in the reserved kidney beans and lime zest; season and warm through. Serve with coriander, lime wedges, and rice.

name: Vegetable & bean chilli

ingredients.raw_text: 400g can kidney beans in water, drained

steps: Heat the oil and cook the garlic, ginger, onion, courgettes, and peppers about 5 minutes until softening. Add the chilli powder and cook 1 minute more.
Stir in the lentils, tomato puree, tomatoes, and water. Bring to a boil and cook 15-20 minutes.
Add the sweetcorn and beans and cook 10 minutes more.

name: Quick chilli with creamy chive crushed potatoes

ingredients.raw_text: 1kg new potatoes, skins on, thickly sliced
1 tsp each ground coriander, chilli powder and ground cumin
400g can red kidney beans in water, rinsed and drained
2 x 400g cans chopped tomatoes with herbs

steps: Squeeze the sausage meat into small balls and fry in the oil 5 minutes until golden. Meanwhile, boil the potatoes 10 minutes until tender. Add the peppers to the pan and fry 4 minutes more. Add the garlic and spices for 1 minute, then the beans, tomatoes, and sugar. Simmer 5 minutes until saucy and the meatballs are cooked.
Drain and crush the potatoes. Fold in the yogurt and chives, loosening with a splash of water. Serve alongside the chilli, topped with extra yogurt and chives if desired.

name: Air fryer salmon

ingredients.raw_text: 4 salmon fillets (we used 4 x 130g fillets), skin on or removed
cooked seasonal greens  and grains such as quinoa or brown rice, to serve (optional)

steps: Combine the salt, pepper, mixed herbs, and garlic granules (if using) on a plate. Rub the salmon with oil and coat in the seasoning.

Place in the air fryer basket in a single layer and cook at 180C 8-10 minutes until cooked through, checking larger fillets in 1-2 minute increments past 10 minutes. Serve with greens and quinoa or rice.

name: Air fryer chicken thighs
steps: Combine the paprika, herbs, garlic granules (if using), salt, and pepper on a plate. Rub the chicken thighs with oil and coat in the spice mix.

Place skin-side down in the air fryer and cook 10 minutes at 180C. Flip and cook 10-15 minutes more until cooked through and the skin is crisp, checking the juices run clear. Remove immediately to keep the skin crisp.

name: Air fryer sausages
steps: Pierce the sausages a few times (optional, helps release fat) and arrange in a single layer in the air fryer basket.
Cook at 180C for 10-15 minutes, turning every 5 minutes, until cooked through (75C internally if checking with a thermometer). Serve as a breakfast side or in buns.

name: Quick & easy tiramisu

ingredients.food_name: Mascarpone min. 80 % fat in dry matter

steps: Dissolve the coffee granules in boiling water, then stir in the coffee liqueur and cold water. Pour into a shallow dish.
Beat the mascarpone, condensed milk, and vanilla until thick and smooth.
Break the sponge fingers and briefly soak in the coffee mixture. Layer into glasses with the cream, dust with cocoa, and chill at least 1 hour before serving.

name: Easy Thai prawn curry

ingredients.raw_text: 1-2 tsp Thai red curry paste (we used Sharwood's)

steps: Heat the oil and cook the onion and ginger a few minutes until softened. Stir in the curry paste for 1 minute, then add the tomatoes and coconut cream. Bring to a boil and simmer 5 minutes, adding water if it thickens too much.
Add the prawns and cook 5-10 minutes depending on size. Serve with rice and a scattering of coriander.

name: Basil pesto

ingredients.raw_text: large bunch of basil, leaves picked

ingredients.food_name: Vegetarian cold cuts alternative, with egg

steps: Toast the nuts in a dry pan over low heat. Blend or pound with the remaining ingredients into a rough sauce. Keeps refrigerated three days.

name: Falafel burgers

ingredients.raw_text: handful of flat-leaf parsley  or curly parsley
½ tsp harissa paste  or chilli powder

ingredients.food_name: Green asparagus salad (cooked) with vinegar marinade

steps: Pat the drained chickpeas dry. Blend with the onion, garlic, parsley, cumin, coriander, harissa, flour, and salt until fairly smooth. Shape into four patties.
Heat the oil and fry the patties 3 minutes per side until lightly golden. Serve with toasted pitta, tomato salsa, and green salad.

name: Easy stuffed peppers

ingredients.food_name: Brine cheese made from goat's milk, min. 45 % fat in dry matter

steps: Cut the tops off the peppers and remove the seeds. Microwave cut-side up on high 5-6 minutes until softened.
Meanwhile, combine the tomato rice with the pesto, chopped olives, and most of the goat's cheese.
Fill the peppers with the rice mixture, top with the remaining cheese, and microwave 8-10 minutes more.

name: Chicken pasta bake

ingredients.food_name: Mascarpone min. 80 % fat in dry matter

ingredients.raw_text: 4 skinless chicken breasts, sliced into strips

ingredients.food_name: Chester (Cheddar) cheese min. 50 % fat in dry matter
Mozzarella min. 45 % fat in dry matter

ingredients.raw_text: ½ small bunch of parsley, finely chopped

steps: Heat 2 tbsp oil and cook the onion gently 10-12 minutes. Add the garlic and chilli flakes for 1 minute. Add the tomatoes and sugar; season and simmer uncovered 20 minutes until thickened, then stir in the mascarpone.
Heat 1 tbsp oil and cook the seasoned chicken 5-7 minutes until cooked through.

Set the oven to 220C (200C fan/gas 7). Cook the penne per pack instructions, drain, and toss with the remaining oil. Combine with the chicken in an ovenproof dish, pour over the sauce, and top with cheddar, mozzarella, and parsley. Bake 20 minutes until golden and bubbling.

name: Italian broccoli & salmon bake

ingredients.food_name: Mascarpone min. 80 % fat in dry matter

ingredients.raw_text: 8 sundried tomatoes (preserved in olive oil), drained and thickly sliced
2 tbsp small capers (optional) rinsed to remove excess salt or vinegar
10 large fresh basil leaves, roughly torn

ingredients.food_name: Chester (Cheddar) cheese min. 50 % fat in dry matter

steps: Set the oven to 190C (170C fan/gas 5). Boil the pasta in salted water 6 minutes, add the broccoli, and boil 4 minutes more until just tender. Drain well.

Meanwhile, whisk the butter, flour, and milk together in a pan over heat until thickened into a smooth sauce. Off the heat, stir in the mascarpone, sundried tomatoes, capers and anchovies (if using), and basil. Combine with the pasta and broccoli; season.
Halve the salmon fillets widthways and arrange in a single layer in an ovenproof dish. Spoon over the broccoli mixture and top with grated cheddar (can be chilled up to 4 hours ahead).
Bake 30 minutes until bubbling at the edges and pale golden — avoid over-browning to keep the fish from overcooking.

name: Creamy courgette lasagne

ingredients.food_name: Ricotta min. 45 % fat in dry matter
Chester (Cheddar) cheese min. 50 % fat in dry matter

steps: Set the oven to 220C (200C fan/gas 7). Boil the lasagne sheets about 5 minutes until softened but not fully cooked. Rinse in cold water and toss with a little oil to prevent sticking.

Heat the oil and fry the onion 3 minutes, then add the courgettes and garlic and cook until softened and bright green. Stir in two-thirds each of the ricotta and cheddar; season. Warm the tomato sauce in the microwave 2 minutes.

Layer a baking dish with half the courgette mixture, then pasta, then tomato sauce; repeat. Top with the remaining ricotta and cheddar. Bake on the top shelf about 10 minutes until the pasta is tender and the cheese golden.

name: Creamy mushroom pasta

ingredients.raw_text: 200g parmesan (or vegetarian alternative), grated, plus extra to serve
ingredients.food_name: Parmesan cheese min. 30 % fat in dry matter

ingredients.raw_text: ½ small bunch parsley, finely chopped

steps: Heat the oil and butter and cook the onion over low heat 10 minutes until soft and translucent.
Add the mushrooms and cook 10 minutes over medium heat. Add the garlic for 2 minutes, then the wine; simmer until reduced by half.
Add the cream and simmer, then stir in the lemon zest and parmesan; season generously.
Meanwhile, cook the pasta per pack instructions, reserving some cooking water. Toss the pasta into the sauce, loosening with the reserved water. Finish with parsley and extra cheese.

name: Prawn jambalaya

ingredients.raw_text: 150g pack small prawns, thawed if frozen

steps: Heat the oil and cook the onion and celery 5 minutes to soften. Add the rice and spices, then the tomatoes and just under a can of water. Stir in the bouillon powder, pepper, garlic, and thyme.
Cover and simmer 30 minutes until the rice is tender and the liquid mostly absorbed. Stir in the prawns and parsley, warm through briefly, and serve.

name: Saucy bean baked eggs

ingredients.food_name: Green bean salad (cooked) with vinegar marinade

steps: Combine the tomatoes and bean salad in an ovenproof pan and simmer 10 minutes until reduced. Stir in the spinach and cook 5 minutes more until wilted.
Heat the grill to medium. Make four wells in the mixture, crack in an egg per well, and nestle the ham around them. Grill 4-5 minutes until the whites are set and yolks runny. Serve with rye bread.

name: Chicken & pesto pasta

ingredients.food_name: Parmesan cheese min. 30 % fat in dry matter

steps: Cook the pasta per pack instructions, adding the green beans for the last 6 minutes. Drain, reserving some cooking water.
Meanwhile, heat the oil and cook the spring onions 1-2 minutes until soft; set aside.
Add the shredded chicken to the pan and warm through. Stir in the pesto and cream, then add the pasta and beans, coating everything and loosening with reserved water. Season and top with parmesan.

name: Home-style lamb curry

ingredients.raw_text: thumb-sized piece ginger, ½ cut into matchsticks, the rest left whole

ingredients.food_name: Leg of lamb fried in oven Provencal style, with sauce

ingredients.raw_text: 1 red chilli or green chilli, deseeded and sliced
small bunch coriander, stalks finely chopped, leaves roughly chopped
basmati rice and mango chutney or raita, to serve

steps: Blend half the ginger with the onions, garlic, and water to a smooth puree.
Transfer to a deep pan, cover, and simmer 15 minutes.
Uncover and cook 5 minutes more, stirring, until the liquid has mostly evaporated.
Add the oil and remaining ginger (cut into matchsticks); fry, stirring, 3-5 minutes until it starts to color.
Stir in the cinnamon stick, coriander, cumin, turmeric, and fennel seeds, then add the lamb; stir-fry until it changes color.
Add the chopped tomatoes, a can of water, and sliced chilli; season, cover, and simmer 1 hour.
Stir in the chopped coriander stalks, re-cover, and cook 30 minutes more until the lamb is tender, adding water if needed.
Stir through the coriander leaves and serve with basmati rice and chutney or raita.

name: Satay cauliflower & chickpea curry with storecupboard flatbreads

ingredients.raw_text: 1 onion, chopped, or 140g frozen chopped onions
2 garlic cloves, crushed, or 1 tbsp garlic paste
200g coconut milk (use a 400g can and save the rest for the flatbreads)
250g plain flour, plus extra for dusting

steps: Heat the oil and soften the onion 5-10 minutes. Add the garlic for 30 seconds, then the curry paste and peanut butter. Stir in the cauliflower, chickpeas, coconut milk, and water. Season, cover, and simmer 15 minutes until the cauliflower is tender, then uncover and cook 5 minutes more to thicken.

Meanwhile, make the flatbreads: heat a griddle. Combine the flour, baking powder, and salt with the coconut milk into a dough. Roll into thin rounds and cook 1-2 minutes per side until charred and puffed. Serve the curry with the flatbreads and coriander.

name: One-pan spicy rice

ingredients.raw_text: 2 tbsp medium curry paste (Madras is a good one to use)

steps: Heat the oil in a lidded pan and fry the garlic and curry paste 1 minute until fragrant.

Add the rice, stock, chickpeas, and raisins, stirring to prevent clumping. Season, cover, bring to a boil, then reduce to medium heat and cook 12-15 minutes until the liquid is absorbed and the rice is tender.
Squeeze excess water from the spinach and stir it in with a splash of hot water, fluffing the rice. Toss in the cashews and serve with yogurt if desired.

name: Bean & pepper chilli

ingredients.raw_text: 1-3 tsp chilli powder, depending on how hot you want your chilli to be
400g can kidney beans in chilli sauce

steps: Heat the oil and cook the onion and peppers 8 minutes until softened. Add the spices and cook 1 minute.
Add the beans and tomatoes, bring to a boil, and simmer 15 minutes until thickened. Season and serve with rice.

name: Kidney bean curry

ingredients.raw_text: thumb-sized piece of ginger, peeled and finely chopped
1 small pack coriander, stalks finely chopped, leaves roughly shredded

steps: Heat the oil over low-medium heat and cook the onion with a pinch of salt slowly until soft and lightly colored. Add the garlic, ginger, and coriander stalks; cook 2 minutes more until fragrant.
Stir in the spices and cook 1 minute until aromatic. Add the chopped tomatoes and kidney beans with their liquid; bring to a boil.
Lower the heat and simmer 15 minutes until thickened. Season to taste and serve with basmati rice and coriander leaves.

name: Chicken with mustard lentils

ingredients.raw_text: pack of 4  chicken thighs and 4 chicken drumsticks

ingredients.food_name: Smoothie of green fruits and vegetables

steps: Heat the oil in a lidded casserole. Season and brown the chicken 3 minutes per side; set aside. Pour off most of the oil.

Cook the onion 5 minutes, add the garlic for 1 minute, then the lentils and stock. Top with the chicken, cover, and simmer over medium heat 30 minutes. Uncover, raise the heat, and cook 20 minutes more until the lentils are tender, most stock absorbed, and the chicken cooked through.
Stir in the creme fraiche, lemon zest and juice, mustard, and parsley; season. Serve with green vegetables.

name: Banana & blueberry muffins

ingredients.raw_text: 50g porridge oats, plus 1 tbsp for topping
2 medium bananas, the riper the better

steps: Set the oven to 180C (160C fan/gas 4) and line a muffin tin. Combine the flour and bicarbonate of soda in a bowl with most of the sugar and half the oats, reserving 1 tbsp sugar. Make a well. Mash the bananas and stir in the buttermilk, oil, and egg whites.

Pour the wet mixture into the well and stir briefly (a lumpy batter is fine — don't overmix). Fold in the blueberries with one more stir. Divide between the cases, top with the reserved oats and sugar, and bake 18-20 minutes until risen and dark golden. Cool 5 minutes before transferring to a rack.

name: Breakfast muffins

ingredients.raw_text: 100g apple sauce or pureed apples (find with the baby food)
50g rolled oats, plus extra for sprinkling
2 tbsp mixed seed (we used pumpkin, sunflower and flaxseed)

steps: Set the oven to 180C (160C fan/gas 4) and line a 12-hole muffin tin. In a jug, whisk together the eggs, yogurt, oil, apple sauce, banana, honey, and vanilla. In a separate large bowl, combine the remaining dry ingredients (except the seeds) with a pinch of salt.

Fold the wet mixture into the dry until just combined - avoid overmixing, or the muffins will turn dense. Divide among the cases, then top with the reserved oats and seeds. Bake 25-30 minutes until risen and golden, and a skewer comes out clean. Cool on a wire rack. Keeps in a sealed container up to 3 days.

name: Easy egg muffins

ingredients.food_name: Chester (Cheddar) cheese min. 50 % fat in dry matter

steps: Set the oven to 200C (180C fan/gas 4) and oil an 8-hole muffin tin. Heat the remaining oil and cook the broccoli, pepper, and spring onions 5 minutes; cool.

Whisk the eggs with the milk, smoked paprika, and half the cheese. Stir in the cooked vegetables, divide between the muffin holes, and top with the remaining cheese and chives. Bake 15-17 minutes until golden and set.

name: Healthy banana muffins

ingredients.raw_text: 50g rolled oats, plus extra for sprinkling
2 tbsp mixed seed, we used pumpkin, sunflower and flaxseed

steps: Set the oven to 180C (160C fan/gas 4) and line a 12-hole muffin tin. Whisk together the eggs, yogurt, oil, apple sauce, banana, honey, and vanilla in a jug. Combine the remaining dry ingredients (except seeds) with a pinch of salt in a large bowl.

Fold the wet mixture into the dry until just combined — don't overmix. Divide between the cases, top with extra oats and seeds, and bake 25-30 minutes until risen and a skewer comes out clean. Cool on a rack; keeps airtight up to 3 days.

name: Easy banana muffins

ingredients.raw_text: 125ml buttermilk (or add 1 tsp of lemon juice to milk and leave for 20 mins)
50g pecans, chopped, plus extra to decorate (optional)

steps: Set the oven to 190C (170C fan/gas 5) and line a muffin tin. Sift the flour, baking powder, bicarbonate of soda, and sugar with salt. Separately combine the melted butter, vanilla, eggs, mashed bananas, and buttermilk.

Pour the wet mixture into a well in the dry ingredients and mix gently with a fork. Fold in the pecans if using, divide between the cases, top with pecan halves, and bake 20-25 minutes until golden. Cool on a rack.

name: Basic muffin recipe

ingredients.raw_text: 400g self-raising flour (or same quantity plain flour and 3 tsp baking powder)
100g chocolate chips or dried fruit such as sultanas or dried cherries (optional)

steps: Set the oven to 200C (180C fan/gas 6) and line two muffin trays. Beat the eggs with an electric mixer 1 minute.
Add the oil and milk and beat until combined, then add the sugar and whisk to a smooth batter.
Sift in the flour and salt (or flour and baking powder) and mix until just smooth — avoid overmixing.
Fold in the chocolate chips or dried fruit if using.
Fill the cases two-thirds full and bake 20-25 minutes until risen and a skewer comes out clean, swapping shelves halfway if needed.
Cool briefly in the tin, then transfer to a rack.

name: Apple & sultana muffins
steps: Set the oven to 180C (160C fan/gas 4). Combine the self-raising flour, baking powder, cinnamon, wholemeal flour, and sugar.
In a separate bowl, mix the eggs, milk, and oil. Combine the wet and dry ingredients, then fold in the grated apples and sultanas.
Divide between 12 muffin cases and bake 25 minutes. Cool on a rack before packing for lunch.

name: Spiced carrot & apple muffins

ingredients.raw_text: 50g sultanas, raisins, chopped nuts or seeds (optional)

steps: Set the oven to 180C (160C fan/gas 4) and line a tin with nine cases. Combine the oil, yogurt, honey, eggs, and vanilla in a jug. In a bowl, mix the flour, bicarbonate of soda, mixed spice, and salt. Combine the two mixtures with the apple and carrot (and any extras), then divide into the cases.
Bake 20-22 minutes until a skewer comes out clean. Cool at least 5 minutes; keeps airtight up to three days or frozen two months.

name: Chocolate chip muffins

ingredients.raw_text: 150g chocolate chips, milk, white, dark or a mix of all three

steps: Set the oven to 200C (180C fan/gas 6) and line a muffin tin. Sift the flour and bicarbonate of soda, then stir in the chocolate chips and sugar. Add the beaten eggs, yogurt, and butter, combining without overmixing (a lumpy batter is fine).
Fill the cases and bake 20-25 minutes until risen and golden. Cool on a rack, or eat slightly warm; keeps airtight up to three days.

name: Choc-cherry muffins

ingredients.raw_text: 100g bar  white chocolate, cut into chunks
100g bar  dark chocolate, cut into chunks

steps: Set the oven to 200C (180C fan/gas 6) and line a muffin tin. Sift the flour and bicarbonate of soda, then stir in the cherries, chocolate, and sugar. Add the beaten eggs, yogurt, and butter, mixing without overworking (lumps are fine).
Fill the cases and bake 20-25 minutes until risen and golden. Cool on a rack — best served slightly warm.

name: Easy banana pancakes

ingredients.raw_text: pecan halves, toasted and roughly chopped (optional)

steps: Sift the flour, baking powder, and salt into a bowl. Separately, mash the bananas and whisk in the eggs, vanilla, and milk. Combine the wet and dry ingredients quickly into a smooth batter.
Heat a little butter in a non-stick pan and cook 2-3 tbsp batter per pancake a few minutes until bubbles appear. Flip and cook 1-2 minutes more. Repeat, keeping cooked pancakes warm.
Stack and top with banana slices, maple syrup, and pecans if desired.

name: Spinach pancakes with harissa yogurt & poached eggs

ingredients.food_name: White cabbage salad (raw) with vinegar marinade

steps: Wilt the spinach in a pan a few minutes. Transfer to a food processor; melt the butter in the same pan, cool briefly, and add to the processor with the spinach and one egg. Blend until finely chopped.
Combine the flour, nutmeg, and baking powder and add to the processor; blend to combine. Add the milk and blend to a batter, adding more milk for thinner pancakes.

Combine the yogurt and harissa to taste. Cook ladlefuls of batter in the buttery pan over medium-low heat 2 minutes until nearly set, flip, and cook 1 minute more. Keep warm in a low oven; repeat to make four to six pancakes.
Poach the remaining eggs in barely simmering water with a splash of vinegar, 3-4 minutes each, until whites are set. Top the pancakes with harissa yogurt, poached eggs, and nigella seeds.

name: Vegan banana pancakes

ingredients.raw_text: 2 tbsp vegetable oil, plus extra for cooking
150ml oat, almond milk or soya milk
syrup, sliced banana and berries, to serve (optional)

steps: Mash the banana and stir in the sugar, salt, and oil. Add the flour and baking powder and mix well, then gradually whisk in the milk to a thick, droppable batter.
Heat a little oil and cook 2 tbsp batter per pancake, 2-3 minutes per side until golden (makes about 4-5). Serve with syrup, banana, and berries.

name: Tofu brekkie pancakes

ingredients.raw_text: maple syrup or honey, to serve
1 tbsp vegetable oil, plus 1-2 tbsp extra for frying

steps: Set the oven to 180C (160C fan/gas 4). Toast the nuts on a tray 5 minutes until golden; cool and chop.
Blend the tofu, vanilla, lemon juice, and most of the milk until thick and smooth like yogurt. Stir in the oil and remaining milk to loosen.
Whisk the dry ingredients with salt in a bowl. Make a well, pour in the tofu mixture, and combine to a thick batter.

Heat a non-stick pan with a little oil until sizzling hot. Spoon in batter for pancakes about 12cm across. Cook 2 minutes until bubbles cover the surface, flip, and cook 1 minute more. Keep warm without stacking; repeat with more oil.
Serve warm with sliced banana, berries, toasted nuts, and maple syrup or honey.

name: Almond crêpes with avocado & nectarines

ingredients.raw_text: 1 avocado, halved, stoned and flesh lightly crushed
½ lime, cut into 2 wedges, for squeezing over

steps: Beat one egg with half the almonds and a splash of water. Heat oil in a non-stick pan and pour in the mixture, swirling to coat the base. Cook until set and golden underneath, about 2 minutes (no need to flip). Turn out and repeat with the remaining egg, almonds, and water.
Top each crepe with avocado, nectarines, and pomegranate, and squeeze over lime at the table.

name: Banana & cinnamon pancakes with blueberry compote

ingredients.raw_text: 1 tsp ground cinnamon, plus extra for sprinkling

steps: Whisk the flour, cinnamon, whole eggs, and milk into a smooth batter, then stir in the banana. Separately whisk the egg whites until fluffy and fold into the batter.
Heat a little oil and cook a quarter of the batter at a time, swirling to coat the pan, until set and golden; flip carefully and cook the other side. Repeat to make four pancakes.

For the compote, gently heat the berries until just bursting but still holding shape. Serve two warm pancakes with half the compote, scattered with mint and a little cinnamon. Chill the rest for the next day, reheating in the microwave or a pan.

name: Classic pancakes

ingredients.raw_text: oil  or melted butter, for frying

steps: Sift the flour and salt into a bowl. Make a well, add the egg and half the milk, and whisk together, gradually drawing in the flour to a smooth thick batter. Beat out any lumps, then stir in the remaining milk.
Heat a little oil or butter in a pan, tipping off the excess. Pour in a thin layer of batter and cook 30-60 seconds until golden underneath.
Flip with a palette knife and cook the other side until golden. Slide out and repeat with the remaining batter.
To make ahead, stack the cooked pancakes and reheat in the microwave about 2 minutes, or wrapped in foil in a 180C (160C fan/gas 4) oven for 10 minutes.

name: Scotch pancakes
steps: Combine the dry ingredients in a bowl. Whisk in the egg and milk. Heat a little oil in a non-stick pan over medium heat.

Spoon in batter for pancakes about 10cm across. Cook about 1 minute until the edges firm and bubbles appear, flip, and cook 30 seconds more until golden on both sides. Serve with your favorite toppings.

name: Perfect pancakes recipe

ingredients.raw_text: 1 tbsp sunflower oil  or vegetable, plus extra for frying

steps: Combine the flour and salt in a large bowl.
Make a well and crack in the eggs.
Add some of the milk and the oil, whisking from the center outward to gradually incorporate the flour, then beat to a smooth thick paste, loosening with more milk if needed.
Whisk in the remaining milk gradually until the batter reaches the consistency of thick single cream.
Heat a pan over medium heat and wipe with oiled paper.
Ladle in batter, tilting for an even thin layer, pouring excess back into the bowl.
Cook undisturbed about 30 seconds until golden underneath.
Flip with a palette knife, ensuring it lies flat, and cook 30 seconds more before turning out.
Repeat with the remaining batter, serving as you go or stacking; freezes up to 1 month or can be made a day ahead.

name: Carrot cake overnight oats

ingredients.raw_text: a big pinch of mixed spice

steps: Combine the grated carrot, mixed spice, and cinnamon with the oats, water, and salt. Cover and chill overnight.
The next day, stir in the honey and sultanas, then top with Greek yogurt.

name: Peanut butter overnight oats
steps: Stir the frozen raspberries into the oats with water and salt. Cover and chill overnight.
The next day, mix in the maple syrup and top with peanut butter.

name: Vanilla-almond chia breakfast bowl
steps: Combine all porridge ingredients in a bowl and let soak at least 20 minutes. Once the oats soften, stir in half the blueberries, adding a little water if the mixture is too thick.
Divide between two bowls and top each with the remaining blueberries, almonds, and honey.

name: Pear, nut & blackberry Bircher

ingredients.raw_text: a small handful of pomegranate seeds

steps: Grate the whole pear (skin and all) into a small jar or container, including any juice.

Add the oats, cinnamon, and yogurt; stir well. Toast the macadamia nuts in a dry pan 2 minutes, then chop and scatter over with blackberries and pomegranate seeds. Chill at least 1 hour, or overnight.

name: Black Forest Bircher

ingredients.raw_text: 1 tbsp cacao powder or cocoa powder
1 tbsp maple syrup or honey, plus extra to serve (optional)

steps: Combine the pears, oats, cacao, yogurt, milk, and maple syrup. Divide into four bowls or containers.
Top each with cherries, a spoonful of yogurt, and extra maple syrup if desired. Finely grate chocolate over each. Eat right away or chill up to 2 days.

name: Orange & blueberry Bircher
steps: Combine 70g oats and 2 tbsp golden linseeds with the zest of half an orange. Pour over 300ml boiling water and leave overnight. The next day, stir in three-quarters of a 175g tub of yogurt, spoon into glasses or bowls, and top with 2 peeled and chopped oranges, the rest of the yogurt, and 4 handfuls of blueberries from a 150g pack.

name: Berry Bircher
steps: Combine the oats and seeds with boiling water and stir well. Mash in the bananas and most of the raspberries (reserving some), cover, and chill overnight.
The next day, layer the mixture in glasses with the yogurt and top with the reserved raspberries.

name: Bircher muesli with apple & banana

ingredients.raw_text: 25g mixed seeds (such as sunflower, pumpkin, sesame and linseed)
25g mixed nuts (such as Brazils, hazelnuts, almonds, pecans and walnuts), roughly chopped

steps: Combine the grated apple with the oats, seeds, half the nuts, and cinnamon. Stir in the yogurt and water, cover, and chill several hours or overnight. Divide into bowls and top with sliced banana, sultanas, and remaining nuts.

name: Blueberry Bircher pots
steps: Combine the grated apple with the oats and yogurt. Layer in a container with blueberries.

name: Pistachio nut & spiced apple Bircher muesli

ingredients.raw_text: 3 tbsp pomegranate seeds or mixed berries

steps: Combine the base ingredients (except yogurt) with water and soak at least 20 minutes, or overnight. Once softened, stir in the yogurt, divide between two bowls, and top with the topping.

name: Pear & blueberry breakfast bowl

ingredients.raw_text: 1 firm but ripe red-skinned pear, unpeeled
3 tbsp skimmed milk, plus a bit extra

steps: Grate the pear into a bowl and combine with the oats, half the yogurt, the milk, and most of the seeds. Rest 5-10 minutes, thinning with more milk or water if too thick. Top with the remaining yogurt, berries, and seeds.

name: Weaning recipe: Baby Bircher

ingredients.raw_text: ½ or 1 small apple or pear, finely grated (or 2 tbsp fruit purée)

ingredients.food_name: Milk-cereal puree, with oat flakes and apple juice (suitable as baby food)

steps: Combine the fruit, oats, chia seeds, and milk (steam the fruit first for babies used to purees, or finely grate for those used to more texture).
Cover and soak in the fridge 1 hour, until the chia seeds are soft and gel-like. Serve the same day for babies; toddlers' portions can sit in the fridge overnight for breakfast.

name: Raspberry and apple smoothie
steps: Blend all the ingredients until smooth, adding water or milk if too thick.

name: Breakfast smoothie

ingredients.raw_text: about 140g blackberries, blueberries, raspberries or strawberries  (or use a mix), plus extra to serve
apple juice  or mineral water, optional

steps: Blend the banana and berries until smooth. With the blender running, add juice or water to reach your preferred consistency. Top with extra fruit, a drizzle of honey, and serve.

name: Strawberry green goddess smoothie

ingredients.raw_text: 1 small avocado, halved and the flesh scooped out
2 small oranges, juiced, plus ½ tsp finely grated zest

steps: Blend all the ingredients until completely smooth, thinning with a splash of cold water if too thick. Pour into glasses and serve right away.

name: Two-minute breakfast smoothie

ingredients.raw_text: 80g soft fruit (whatever you have – strawberries, blueberries, and mango all work well)
ingredients.food_name: Carbonated soft drink with higher fruit juice content

steps: Blend all the ingredients 1 minute until smooth.
Pour into two glasses to serve.

name: Sunshine smoothie
steps: Blend the ingredients until smooth. Drink immediately or bottle for later; keeps refrigerated up to a day.

name: Kale smoothie
steps: Blend all the ingredients with a splash of water, adding more water to reach your preferred consistency.

name: Green goddess smoothie bowl

ingredients.raw_text: 1 ripe avocado, stoned, peeled and chopped into chunks
1 small ripe mango, stoned, peeled and chopped into chunks
250ml milk (unsweetened almond or coconut milk works well)
1 tbsp unsweetened almond or peanut butter
1 tbsp clear honey, agave or maple syrup (optional)
2 tbsp clear honey, agave or maple syrup
175g mixed fresh fruit, chopped (we used banana, mango, raspberries and blueberries)

steps: Slice the bananas onto a lined tray and freeze 2 hours until solid (can then be bagged and frozen up to 3 months).

For the seed mix, set the oven to 180C (160C fan/gas 4). Toss the seeds, coconut, and almonds with the cinnamon and honey or syrup, spread on a lined tray, and bake 10-15 minutes, stirring every 5 minutes, until lightly toasted. Cool; keeps airtight up to a month.

Blend the avocado, mango, spinach, milk, nut butter, frozen banana, and honey (if using) to a thick consistency, scraping down as needed. Divide into bowls, top with fruit, and finish with 1-2 tbsp of the seed mix per bowl.

name: Strawberry & banana almond smoothie
steps: Blend the sliced banana, strawberries, yogurt, milk, and ground almonds until completely smooth. Pour into a glass and enjoy.

name: Avocado & strawberry smoothie

ingredients.raw_text: ½ avocado, stoned, peeled and cut into chunks
lemon or  lime juice, to taste

steps: Blend all the ingredients until smooth, thinning with a little water if too thick.

name: Kiwi fruit smoothie
steps: Blend all the ingredients until smooth and pour into two glasses.

name: Green bean casserole
steps: Heat some butter and the oil, and fry the mushrooms 10-15 minutes until golden. Stir in the green beans and cook 3-4 minutes until bright green. Set aside.

Set the oven to 200C (180C fan/gas 6). Melt the remaining butter until foaming, stir in the flour off the heat to form a paste, then return to the heat and gradually whisk in the milk until smooth and thickened; season. Combine with the beans and mushrooms in an ovenproof dish.
Top with crispy onions and bake 20-30 minutes until bubbling and golden, covering if browning too fast.

name: Garlicky green beans
steps: Boil the green beans 2-3 minutes until just tender, drain, and steam-dry briefly.
Meanwhile, gently fry the garlic in oil until pale gold. Toss with the beans, season, and serve.

name: Kidney bean curry

ingredients.raw_text: thumb-sized piece of ginger, peeled and finely chopped
1 small pack coriander, stalks finely chopped, leaves roughly shredded

steps: Heat the oil over low-medium heat and cook the onion with a pinch of salt slowly until soft and lightly colored. Add the garlic, ginger, and coriander stalks; cook 2 minutes more until fragrant.
Stir in the spices and cook 1 minute until aromatic. Add the chopped tomatoes and kidney beans with their liquid; bring to a boil.
Lower the heat and simmer 15 minutes until thickened. Season to taste and serve with basmati rice and coriander leaves.

name: Vegetable & bean chilli

ingredients.raw_text: 400g can kidney beans in water, drained

steps: Heat the oil and cook the garlic, ginger, onion, courgettes, and peppers about 5 minutes until softening. Add the chilli powder and cook 1 minute more.
Stir in the lentils, tomato puree, tomatoes, and water. Bring to a boil and cook 15-20 minutes.
Add the sweetcorn and beans and cook 10 minutes more.

name: Refried bean quesadillas

ingredients.raw_text: 400g can pinto or kidney beans, rinsed and drained

ingredients.food_name: Chester (Cheddar) cheese min. 50 % fat in dry matter

ingredients.raw_text: 200g tub fresh tomato salsa, plus extra to serve

steps: Heat the oil and cook the onion and garlic 2 minutes. Add the cumin for 1 minute, then the beans, paprika, and a splash of water, mashing to a rough puree as they warm; season generously.

Spread the beans on half the tortillas, top with cheese, coriander, and salsa, then sandwich with the remaining tortillas. Cook each in a dry pan or griddle 1-2 minutes per side until crisp and golden with melted cheese. Serve warm, cut into wedges, with extra salsa and soured cream.

name: Easy chilli con carne

ingredients.raw_text: 2 beef stock cubes (we like Just Bouillon)
2 large red peppers, deseeded and cut into chunks
3 x 400g cans red kidney beans, drained

steps: Set the oven to 150C (130C fan/gas 3). Heat the oil and fry the onions 8 minutes. Add the garlic, spices, and oregano; cook 1 minute. Add the mince gradually, browning it, then stir in the tomatoes, half a can of water, and crumbled stock cube; season.
Cover and bake 30 minutes. Stir in the peppers and sundried tomatoes, then bake 30 minutes more until the peppers are tender. Stir in the beans.
Reheat on the hob until bubbling before serving with avocado or salad, rice or tortilla chips, and soured cream.

For a slow cooker: fry the onions 8 minutes, add the garlic, spices, and oregano for 1 minute, then brown the mince. Transfer everything to the slow cooker with the tomatoes, peppers, sundried tomatoes, beans, and crumbled stock cubes; season. Cook on low 8-10 hours, then serve as above.

name: Chilli beef shepherd's pie

ingredients.raw_text: 420g can kidney bean in chilli sauce
1kg parsnips, peeled and chopped into chunks

steps: Heat the oil and soften the onion with 1 tsp cumin. Push aside, brown the beef, breaking up lumps. Add the garlic, kidney beans, tomatoes, and half a can of water; season, cover, and simmer 20 minutes.

Meanwhile, boil the parsnips until tender, drain, and mash with pepper and salt. Heat the grill to high. Transfer the chilli to an ovenproof dish, top with the mash, scatter with the remaining cumin seeds, and grill 5 minutes until golden.

name: Quick chilli with creamy chive crushed potatoes

ingredients.raw_text: 1kg new potatoes, skins on, thickly sliced
1 tsp each ground coriander, chilli powder and ground cumin
400g can red kidney beans in water, rinsed and drained
2 x 400g cans chopped tomatoes with herbs

steps: Squeeze the sausage meat into small balls and fry in the oil 5 minutes until golden. Meanwhile, boil the potatoes 10 minutes until tender. Add the peppers to the pan and fry 4 minutes more. Add the garlic and spices for 1 minute, then the beans, tomatoes, and sugar. Simmer 5 minutes until saucy and the meatballs are cooked.
Drain and crush the potatoes. Fold in the yogurt and chives, loosening with a splash of water. Serve alongside the chilli, topped with extra yogurt and chives if desired.

name: Mexican bean salad

ingredients.raw_text: 2 x 400g  cans of beans, (we used  pinto bean  and kidney beans, rinsed and drained
large bunch coriander, leaves only, roughly chopped
bottle bought good-quality dressing  (we used English Provender Company Lime & Coriander dressing)
1 red chilli, deseeded and finely sliced

steps: Boil the eggs 6.5 minutes, then cool in cold water. Slice the avocados and combine with the beans, onion, coriander, and tomatoes in a large bowl. Combine 3 tbsp of the dressing with the chilli and cumin. Peel and quarter the still-warm eggs. Toss the salad with the dressing and arrange the eggs on top. Serve right away with toasted tortillas.

name: Cheesy bean potatoes

ingredients.raw_text: 175g mature cheddar, grated, plus 85g for sprinkling
ingredients.food_name: Chester (Cheddar) cheese min. 50 % fat in dry matter

steps: Set the oven to 200C (220C fan/gas 7). Oil and season the potatoes and bake 1 hour until a knife slides in easily. Cool 10 minutes.

Halve lengthways and scoop out the flesh, leaving a thin shell. Mash with the butter, mustard, and seasoning, then stir in the spring onions, most of the cheese, and the kidney beans. Refill the skins and top with the remaining cheese (can be made a day ahead and chilled). Bake 30-40 minutes until golden. Serve with sausages and salad.

name: Spicy chicken fried rice

ingredients.raw_text: 2 red  peppers, deseeded and thinly sliced
400g  can  kidney bean, rinsed and drained

steps: Boil the rice with a crumbled stock cube about 20 minutes until tender. Drain well.

Meanwhile, toss the chicken in the spices and coriander. Heat the oil and stir-fry the peppers 3 minutes until softening. Add the chicken and fry until golden, about 5 minutes. Add the rice, beans, and spring onions, and warm through.

name: Grilled courgette & halloumi salad with caper & lemon dressing
steps: Combine all the dressing ingredients with a splash of water and a pinch of salt; set aside.
Toss the courgettes with oil and a pinch of salt.
Griddle the courgettes cut-side down (in batches) 4-5 minutes until char marks form, flip, and cook 3 minutes more. Transfer to a bowl and cover to keep warm.
Meanwhile, cook the halloumi in a separate hot pan a few minutes until golden on both sides.
Arrange the courgettes and halloumi on a platter and spoon over the dressing.

name: Halloumi & chipotle loaf

ingredients.raw_text: 500g strong bread flour, plus extra for dusting

steps: Combine the flour and softened butter into fine crumbs. Add the yeast and sugar to one side, salt to the other, and mix together.
Make a well and add warm water, mixing to a rough dough.
Knead 10-15 minutes by hand (or 6-8 minutes in a stand mixer) until smooth and elastic. Prove in an oiled, covered bowl somewhere warm 1 hour until doubled.
Flatten the dough to remove air, then scatter over the halloumi and chipotle flakes. Fold and knead to distribute evenly.
Shape into a neat ball, seam-side down, on a lined tray. Cover and prove 1 hour more until doubled (a slow-springing indent means it's ready).
Set the oven to 240C (220C fan/gas 7) with a roasting tin on the bottom shelf. Dust the dough with flour and score a cross on top.
Place the tray in the roasting tin and pour hot water around it for steam. Bake 20-25 minutes until golden and hollow-sounding when tapped.
Cool on a rack before slicing and serving with butter.

name: Spiced halloumi & pineapple burger with zingy slaw

ingredients.raw_text: 1 Little Gem lettuce, divided into 4 lettuce cups, or 2 small seeded burger buns, cut in half, to serve (optional)

steps: Heat the barbecue. Combine the cabbage, carrot, radish, and coriander with the lime juice, half the oil, and chilli flakes; season and mix well (can be made ahead and chilled).

Combine the remaining oil with the chipotle paste and coat the halloumi. Grill the halloumi and pineapple 2 minutes per side until the cheese golds and the pineapple caramelizes (or use a hot griddle indoors). Brush the buns with the remaining chipotle oil and toast cut-side down for the last 30 seconds.
Build the burgers with lettuce or buns, slaw, halloumi, and pineapple. Serve with the remaining slaw.

name: Halloumi, carrot & orange salad

ingredients.raw_text: 3 tbsp rapeseed or olive oil, plus extra for frying

steps: Peel and segment the oranges over a bowl to catch the juice, squeezing extra juice from the pith. Whisk in the mustard, honey, vinegar, oil, and seasoning.

Peel carrot ribbons into the dressing and toss gently. Cook the halloumi in a little oil until golden on both sides. Toss the watercress through the dressed carrots, plate, and top with halloumi and orange segments.

name: Pesto & goat's cheese risotto

ingredients.food_name: Soft cheese made from goat's milk, min. 45 % fat in dry matter

steps: Heat oil in a pan, add the rice, and fry 1 minute. Add half the stock and cook until absorbed, then add the rest a ladle at a time, stirring, until the rice is al dente, about 20-25 minutes.
Stir in the pesto and half the goat's cheese. Serve topped with the remaining cheese.

name: Shallot tarte tatin with goat's cheese

ingredients.raw_text: 2 tbsp demerara or soft light brown sugar
100g-140g goat's cheese, sliced into rounds (we used 140g)
ingredients.food_name: Brine cheese made from goat's milk, min. 45 % fat in dry matter

steps: Set the oven to 200C (180C fan/gas 6). Cover the shallots with boiling water 10 minutes, then drain and peel.

Heat the oil and butter and fry the shallots gently 10-15 minutes until softened and lightly browned. Stir in the vinegar, sugar, and thyme leaves; cook a few minutes until caramelized. Season and remove from heat.

Scatter remaining thyme over the base of a 22cm tin. Add the shallots with their juices. Roll the pastry to a 26cm circle, lay over the shallots, and tuck the edges in. Bake 25-30 minutes until golden.
Rest 5 minutes, then turn out. Dot with goat's cheese and slice into wedges.

name: Caramelised onion & goat's cheese pizza

ingredients.raw_text: 125g wholemeal flour, plus a little for kneading if necessary
1 tsp rapeseed oil, plus extra for greasing
160g baby spinach leaves (not the very tiny ones), chopped

ingredients.food_name: Soft cheese made from goat's milk, min. 45 % fat in dry matter

steps: Set the oven to 220C (200C fan/gas 7). Combine the flour, yeast, salt, oil, and warm water into a soft dough. Knead about 5 minutes in a mixer or 10 minutes by hand. Cover and rest while making the topping.

Cook the onions with oil, water, and balsamic vinegar under a lid 15 minutes, stirring occasionally, until golden and the liquid has evaporated. Set aside. Stir-fry the spinach and garlic in the same pan until wilted.
Divide the dough in half and press each into an oval on a greased tray without kneading first (to avoid it springing back).
Top with the spinach, then onions, dot with cheese, and scatter with olives, thyme, and sunflower seeds. Bake 15 minutes until golden and cooked through.

name: Spinach & goat’s cheese puff

ingredients.raw_text: 400g frozen spinach, thawed and squeezed dry

ingredients.food_name: Soft cheese made from goat's milk, min. 45 % fat in dry matter

steps: Set the oven to 220C (200C fan/gas 7). Unroll the pastry into a tin, trim excess, prick with a fork, and bake 10 minutes.

Blend the spinach with the eggs, milk, half the goat's cheese, and nutmeg until chopped but not smooth. Press down the puffed pastry, spoon over the filling, top with the remaining cheese, and bake 15 minutes until set.

name: Harissa veg, goat’s cheese & couscous salad

ingredients.raw_text: 200g leftover roasted vegetables - aubergine, onions, peppers, carrots, parsnips or butternut squash work well (save any oil from the roasting tin to mix into your salad)

ingredients.food_name: Brine cheese made from goat's milk, min. 45 % fat in dry matter

steps: Season the couscous and add the lemon juice. Cover with boiling water and let sit until absorbed.
Fluff with a fork. Toss the leftover roasted vegetables with harissa and any roasting oil. Combine with the couscous, cheese, and rocket. Pack into containers and chill, or eat right away.

name: Cheddar cheese & shallot pie with fennel seed pastry

ingredients.raw_text: 140g unsalted butter, plus extra for greasing
2 large King Edward potatoes, cut into small cubes

ingredients.food_name: Chester (Cheddar) cheese min. 50 % fat in dry matter

steps: Set the oven to 180C (160C fan/gas 4). Boil the potatoes until just tender but holding shape, about 10-15 minutes.
Melt the butter and sweat the shallots and spring onions with salt over low heat 10-12 minutes. Whisk the eggs, cream, thyme, and cheese together; season and set aside.
For the pastry, melt the butter with water and bring to a simmer. Combine with the remaining pastry ingredients and salt in a bowl, mix, and knead briefly.
Grease a pie dish. Roll two-thirds of the pastry to line the base and sides; roll the remainder for a lid.
Combine the potato and shallot mixture with the egg filling and spoon into the pastry case. Cover with the lid and crimp the edges.
Glaze with beaten egg yolk and milk, poke steam holes, chill 10 minutes, then bake 40-45 minutes.

name: Tomato & harissa stew with cheddar dumplings

ingredients.raw_text: 2 large courgettes, halved lengthways and thickly sliced

ingredients.food_name: Chester (Cheddar) cheese min. 50 % fat in dry matter

steps: Heat the oil and fry the onion and celery 5 minutes until softening. Add the tomatoes and a can of water, then the harissa, courgettes, chickpeas, and crumbled stock cube. Cover and simmer 18 minutes until nearly tender. Set the oven to 200C (180C fan/gas 6).
Meanwhile, rub the butter into the flour, baking powder, and salt, then mix in the cheese. Just before the stew is ready, stir in the milk to form a dough, shape into a log, and cut into 8 pieces.
Top the stew with the dumplings and bake 15-20 minutes until golden and cooked through.

name: Crusty cheddar pies

ingredients.raw_text: 1 ½kg floury potato, such as King Edward, cut into even-sized chunks

ingredients.food_name: Chester (Cheddar) cheese min. 50 % fat in dry matter

steps: Boil salted water and steam the leeks, broccoli, and celery over it while boiling the potatoes 20 minutes until tender. Drain the potatoes and mash with seasoning, some butter, and the yogurt.
Meanwhile, whisk the milk, flour, both mustards, and remaining butter over medium heat until smooth and thickened. Stir in half the cheese; season and remove from heat.
Divide the steamed vegetables and peas among individual pie dishes. Pour over the sauce and top with the mash and remaining cheese.
Freeze for up to 3 months. To serve, bake from frozen in a cold oven set to 200C (180C fan/gas 6) for 50-55 minutes until hot throughout.

name: Courgette, potato & cheddar soup

ingredients.raw_text: bunch spring onion, sliced - save 1 for serving, if eating straight away
100g extra-mature cheddar or vegetarian alternative, grated, plus a little extra to serve
ingredients.food_name: Chester (Cheddar) cheese min. 50 % fat in dry matter

ingredients.raw_text: good grating fresh nutmeg, plus extra to serve

steps: Combine the potatoes with water to cover and crumbled stock cubes; boil, cover, and cook 5 minutes. Add the courgettes and cook 5 minutes more, then the spring onions for a final 5 minutes.

Off the heat, stir in the cheese, nutmeg, salt, and pepper. Blend to a thick soup, thinning with hot water as needed. Serve topped with extra cheddar, spring onions, and nutmeg or pepper; freezes up to 3 months.

name: Cheddar & sweetcorn scones

ingredients.raw_text: 2 large sweetcorn cobs (or 250g sweetcorn kernels from a can, drained weight)
¼ tsp ground cayenne or paprika, plus extra for sprinkling
50g cold unsalted butter, cut into cubes

ingredients.food_name: Chester (Cheddar) cheese min. 50 % fat in dry matter

ingredients.raw_text: 175ml semi-skimmed milk, plus extra for brushing

steps: Slice the corn kernels from the cob and boil 4 minutes until just tender; drain.

Set the oven to 220C (200C fan/gas 7). Combine the flour, baking powder, mustard, cayenne, salt, and thyme, then rub in the butter to fine crumbs. Add most of the cheese and all the corn. Combine the milk and lemon juice and stir in to form a slightly sticky dough.

Knead briefly on a floured surface, divide into 10 pieces, and shape roughly. Brush with milk and top with extra cheese, cayenne, and thyme. Bake 10-12 minutes until risen and hollow-sounding. Cool on a rack.

name: Double-baked cheddar soufflés

ingredients.raw_text: 4 tbsp butter, plus extra for greasing

ingredients.food_name: Chester (Cheddar) cheese min. 50 % fat in dry matter

steps: Set the oven to 180C (160C fan/gas 4). Infuse the milk, onion, nutmeg, and bay leaves by bringing to a boil and letting stand 30 minutes. Butter the ramekins.
Melt the butter, stir in the flour, and cook 1 minute. Off the heat, gradually whisk in the strained milk until smooth, then return to the heat and stir until thickened.

Off the heat, stir in the mustard, egg yolks, and most of the cheese; season. Whisk the egg whites to stiff peaks and fold into the cheese mixture. Fill the ramekins two-thirds full, place in a water bath, and bake 15-20 minutes until risen and just set. Cool.
To serve, set the oven to 220C (200C fan/gas 7). Loosen and turn the souffles into a dish, top with the remaining cheese and a spoonful of cream each, and bake 10-12 minutes until puffed and golden.

name: Cauliflower cheese soup

ingredients.raw_text: 1 large cauliflower (about 900g/2lb), leaves trimmed and cut into florets
1 potato, peeled and cut into chunks
700ml vegetable stock (from a cube is fine)

ingredients.food_name: Chester (Cheddar) cheese min. 50 % fat in dry matter

steps: Heat the butter and cook the onion 5 minutes until softened. Add the cauliflower, potato, stock, milk, and seasoning. Bring to a boil, then simmer about 30 minutes until the cauliflower is soft and the potato nearly collapsing.
Blend to a creamy soup, thinning with more milk if needed. Can be made up to 2 days ahead or frozen up to a month. Reheat, top with cheese pieces, and stir through before serving.

name: Potato, cheddar & red onion pasties

ingredients.food_name: Chester (Cheddar) cheese min. 50 % fat in dry matter
Green asparagus salad (cooked) with vinegar marinade

steps: Set the oven to 190C (170C fan/gas 5). Boil the potato and carrots in salted water 5 minutes until tender; drain.
Combine with the chutney, thyme, mustard, cheese, and seasoning. Chill to cool.

Roll the pastry thin and cut into squares. Fill each, brush the edges with egg, and bring the corners together to seal. Brush with more egg, sprinkle with poppy seeds, and bake 30 minutes until golden. Serve with salad.

name: Tartines with blue cheese, fig & ham

ingredients.raw_text: 1 small baguette, thinly sliced into 20 pieces
5 slices prosciutto, each torn into 4 pieces
ingredients.food_name: Pizza prosciutto (with tomato sauce, boiled ham, mozzarella)

steps: Set the oven to 200C (180C fan/gas 6). Brush the baguette slices with oil, season, and bake 5 minutes until crisp. Cool, then top with cheese, a slice of ham, and a fig quarter each, finishing with black pepper.
Serve alongside crusty bread, French cheeses and meats, tapenade, cornichons, hard-boiled quail eggs, a salad, and a sparkling drink.

name: Quick peach Melba crumbles
steps: Heat the tinned peaches with their syrup and the butter until simmering. Add the raspberries and cook 1-2 minutes more until hot.
Meanwhile, whisk the cream with the icing sugar to soft peaks.
Spoon the fruit into four dishes and top each with granola and a dollop of cream.

name: Quick sticky toffee puddings

ingredients.raw_text: small knob of butter, for greasing

steps: Set the oven to 200C (180C fan/gas 6). Combine the muffins with the sultanas, divide into buttered ramekins, cover with foil, and bake 8 minutes until warmed through.
Meanwhile, gently heat the sugar, butter, and cream until the sugar dissolves. Pour over the pudding and serve warm with ice cream.

name: Easy strawberry mousse
steps: Set aside four whole strawberries for garnish; hull and chop the rest. Blend with the sugar until smooth.

Whip the cream to stiff peaks. Reserve some strawberry puree, then fold the rest into the cream until evenly pink. Spoon the reserved puree into glasses, top with the mousse, and chill at least 1 hour (keeps up to a day). Halve the reserved strawberries to decorate before serving.

name: Easy microwave brownies
steps: Melt the butter in a microwavable dish in 20-second bursts, then swirl to coat the dish and tip into a mixing bowl.
Whisk in the sugar until creamy and fully combined.
Combine the vanilla, milk, and beaten eggs, then whisk gradually into the butter mixture.
Sift in the flour and cocoa, folding gently, then stir in the chocolate chips.
Pour into the dish and smooth. Microwave 5 minutes until risen and slightly firm (a soft center will continue cooking as it cools).
Cool on a rack at least 20 minutes before cutting into 8 squares. Keeps airtight up to three days.

name: Microwave mug cake

ingredients.raw_text: 3 tbsp vegetable oil or sunflower oil
a few drops of vanilla essence or other essence (orange or peppermint work well)
2 tbsp chocolate chips, nuts, or raisins etc (optional)

steps: Combine the flour, sugar, and cocoa powder in a large mug.
Mix in the egg as thoroughly as possible.
Add the milk, oil, and vanilla, mixing until smooth, then stir in any chocolate chips, nuts, or raisins.
Microwave on high 1.5-2 minutes until risen and firm to the touch.

name: Microwave banana pudding

ingredients.raw_text: 100g butter, softened, plus extra for greasing
icing sugar, toffee sauce and ice cream, to serve, if you like

steps: Melt the butter in a baking dish in the microwave. Mash in most of the banana, then add the sugar, flour, cinnamon, eggs, and milk, mixing well.
Slice the remaining banana on top and microwave on high 8 minutes until risen and cooked through. Serve warm, dusted with icing sugar and toffee sauce, with ice cream if desired.

name: 5-minute mocha pots

ingredients.raw_text: 200g milk or dark chocolate with coffee, broken into chunks
ingredients.food_name: Milk drink 3.5 % fat, with coffee, sweetened

steps: Melt the chocolate in the microwave or over simmering water; cool slightly.
Whip the cream with the vanilla to soft peaks, then fold in the cooled chocolate.
Divide into bowls and top with a dollop of creme fraiche just before serving (or chill first and add the creme fraiche later).

name: Vegan mug cake

ingredients.raw_text: 3 tbsp dairy-free milk, we used oat milk
coconut cream or dairy-free ice cream

steps: Combine the milk with the lemon zest and juice in a mug and let sit 2-3 minutes until it looks slightly curdled. Stir in the oil, flour, sugar, and bicarbonate of soda until smooth.
Drop in the raspberries and microwave on high 1.5 minutes until puffed and cooked through.
Serve with coconut cream or dairy-free ice cream.

name: Raspberry fool with whisky & toasted oats
steps: Whisk the cream with the sugar to soft peaks, then fold in the whisky.
Layer the cream in glasses with the toasted oats and halved raspberries. Finish with grated white chocolate.

name: Lemon curd & yogurt fool

ingredients.raw_text: 300g jar  lemon curd  (we used Duchy Originals Traditional Lemon Curd)

steps: Fold the lemon curd and yogurt together for a marbled effect. Divide into glasses and chill.
Crush the raspberries lightly with icing sugar and spoon over the chilled dessert with the juices.

name: After-dinner mint cream

ingredients.food_name: Mascarpone min. 80 % fat in dry matter

ingredients.raw_text: 2-3 tbsp cream sherry (we used Harvey's Bristol Cream)
200g thin after-dinner  mints, plus 6 extra to serve

steps: Whisk the mascarpone, cream, sugar, and sherry until it holds its shape. Break the mints into pieces and fold in. Spoon into small glasses and chill. Top each with one more mint before serving.

name: Strawberry frozen yogurt

ingredients.raw_text: ½ x 405g can light condensed milk

steps: Chop half the strawberries; blend the rest to a puree.
Stir the condensed milk into the puree, then fold in the yogurt. Fold through the chopped strawberries.
Transfer to a container, cover, and freeze overnight until solid. Soften 10-15 minutes before serving; freezes up to a month.

name: Chocolate & berry mousse pots

ingredients.raw_text: 350g berries (try blueberries, raspberries, cherries or a mix)

steps: Melt the chocolate over simmering water without touching the bowl to the water. Cool 5-10 minutes, then stir in the yogurt.
Whisk the egg whites to stiff peaks, add the sugar, and whisk again until stiff. Loosen the chocolate with a spoonful of egg white, then fold in the rest gently to keep the air.
Layer berries in small glasses, top with the mousse, and chill until set.

name: Instant frozen berry yogurt
steps: Blend the berries, yogurt, and honey or agave 20 seconds until it reaches an ice-cream-like texture. Scoop into bowls and serve.

name: Slow cooker rice pudding

ingredients.raw_text: 1 tbsp honey, a handful toasted, flaked almonds and fruit, to serve

steps: Butter the slow cooker insert. Heat the milk to simmering, combine with the pudding rice, and pour into the slow cooker with a grating of nutmeg or cinnamon. Cook on high 2.5 hours, stirring once or twice if possible.
Serve with honey, or flaked almonds and fruit.

name: The ultimate makeover: Chocolate mousse

ingredients.raw_text: 1 tbsp cocoa powder, plus extra for dusting

steps: Finely chop the chocolate into a heatproof bowl. Combine the cocoa, coffee, and vanilla with cold water and pour over. Set over simmering water, stir, then remove from heat, leaving over the water until melted, stirring occasionally.
Once melted and thick, stir in boiling water to thin to a silky consistency. Cool slightly.

Whisk the egg whites to soft peaks, then whisk in the sugar until thick and glossy. Beat the yogurt into the cooled chocolate, fold in a third of the egg whites, then gently fold in the rest without deflating. Spoon into small cups and chill a couple of hours or overnight.
Top each with raspberries and a dusting of cocoa. Keeps refrigerated up to 2 days.

name: Spiced roasted apples & blackberries

ingredients.raw_text: finely grated zest and juice of 1 large orange

steps: Set the oven to 180C (160C fan/gas 4). Core the apples, leaving a coin-sized hole, and score around the middle.
Stand in a baking dish. Combine the honey, cinnamon, and orange zest and spoon into each cavity. Pour the orange juice into the dish.

Roast about 40 minutes, basting occasionally. Add the blackberries around and over the apples near the end and return to the oven 10 minutes until the juices run. Spoon the fruit and juices over to serve.

name: Blood orange & dark chocolate madeleines

ingredients.raw_text: 100g unsalted butter, plus extra for greasing
zest 2 blood oranges plus juice of 1/2 (about 2 tbsp)
100g plain flour, plus extra for dusting
140g dark chocolate (60-70% cocoa solids), finely chopped

steps: Melt the butter over medium heat until it foams and turns nutty brown; cool.
Whisk the eggs, sugar, and zest 5 minutes until thick and pale. Mix in the juice. Combine the flour and baking powder, then fold into the batter in stages.
Combine a spoonful of the batter with the browned butter until smooth, then fold this back into the rest of the batter. Cover and chill overnight.

About 30 minutes before baking, grease and flour a madeleine tin and chill in the freezer. Set the oven to 200C (180C fan/gas 6). Fill each hole with a heaped tablespoon of batter (avoid overfilling).

Bake 10-12 minutes until golden at the edges. Turn out onto a rack to cool. Melt the chocolate in bursts, stirring until fully smooth. Dip each madeleine halfway, let excess drip off, and set on parchment, sprinkling with topping while still tacky if desired.

name: Slow cooker spiced apples with barley
steps: Switch on the slow cooker if needed. Add the barley and 750ml boiling water. Core the apples (leaving a coin-sized hole) and halve them.
Arrange the apples skin-side down over the barley. Combine the cinnamon, nutmeg, and orange zest and sprinkle over the top.
Cook on Low for 2 hours. Serve with natural yogurt.

name: Chocolate-dipped strawberries

ingredients.raw_text: 30g white and milk  chocolate, roughy chopped (optional)

steps: Melt the dark chocolate over simmering water or in short microwave bursts, stirring until smooth. Transfer to a deep bowl.
Dip the strawberries by their tops into the chocolate, tap off excess, and set on parchment to firm up. Save any extra melted chocolate on parchment to reuse.
For decoration, melt the white and milk chocolate and drizzle lightly over the dipped strawberries.

name: Sticky cinnamon figs

ingredients.raw_text: handful  shelled pistachio  nuts or almonds
1 tsp  ground cinnamon  or mixed spice
mascarpone  or Greek yogurt, to serve

steps: Heat the grill to medium-high. Cut a deep cross in each fig and open slightly. Place in a dish, add a small piece of butter to each, drizzle with honey, and sprinkle with nuts and spice.
Grill 5 minutes until softened with a sticky sauce forming. Serve warm with mascarpone or yogurt.

name: Effortless raspberry iced mousse
